data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to this requirement. While there are multiple passed steps related to bookings and member invitations, none of the evidence directly addresses the behavior of tier transitions or the associated financial implications. This indicates a clear gap in the required validation, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of upgrade/downgrade behavior or prorated transition checks.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify upgrade/downgrade and prorated transition behavior.
